chapter_title.en: Prayer of the Sick, the Unconcious, the Weak and the Infirm, the Elderly and Others

text: 1062 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «لاَ يَقْطَعُ اَلتَّبَسُّمُ اَلصَّلاَةَ وَ يَقْطَعُهَا اَلْقَهْقَهَةُ وَ لاَ تَنْقُضُ اَلْوُضُوءَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1062 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Smiling does not invalidate the prayer, but loud laughter does. And smiling does not break the wudu (ablution)."
